case_title: PETER HALLER VS. DESOTO CAB et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSIVE DECLARATION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALLER, PETER
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALLER, PETER SERVED AUG-01-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-07-2002. SEP-13-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT, SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR - KEVIN J. GRAY
AUGUST 13,2002 POS OSC IS OFF CALENDAR.
ARBITRATOR KEVIN JAIME GRAY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-08-2002 THROUGH JAN-06-2003.
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, KEVIN J. GRAY TO COUNSELS; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: DECEMBER 20, 2002 @ 9:00 AM
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB HOLZRICHTER, DONALD
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-04-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALLER, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB HOLZRICHTER, DONALD DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-13-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-09-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-15-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-13-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB HOLZRICHTER, DONALD JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT PLTF RESEREVED JURY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALLER, PETER ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAR-28-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED FEB-04-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALLER, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB $13,188.54 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,188.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-28-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
